title: BG-11 Medium for Freshwater Cyanobacteria
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9jhh","text":"This medium is used successfully for most cyanobacteria. Vitamin B12 may be added for those species that require it. Use f/2 vitamin solution. (Initial pH is approximately 8.5.) When making solid media, you can add agar directly to medium or make double strength medium and double strength agar solution, then after autoclaving combine the two. OPTION: 0.5 g/L of HEPES buffer can be added to the final medium as a buffer. FeCl3 and EDTA added in a 1:1 ratio may be substituted.
